title: Elanco to launch $25M VC program focused on animal health innovation
description:
Indianapolis-based Elanco Animal Health Inc. announced Thursday that it plans to establish a $25 million corporate venture capital program to support, invest in and advance innovation in animal health.

description:

title: Union workers ratify labor agreement with Alcoa
description:
The Pittsburgh-based aluminum producer said the agreement was ratified by a wide margin of union members, though a specific percentage was not provided.

title: US gas prices fall below $4 for 1st time since March, but still 25% higher than last year
description:
U.S. gas prices fell below $4 a gallon on average Thursday, but just barely. It is the first time since March that the average cost for a regular gallon has been that low.

title: Upland acquires Floyd County Brewing Co. in New Albany
description:

title: Indiana regulators OK AES electric rate hike at lower level than initially proposed
description:
The order by the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission will allow AES to raise its electric rates, though at a lower figure than what had been proposed in the initial settlement.
